feed.title: Arnab Sircar
feed.subtitle: Essays and research on AI economics, financial systems, and statistical machine learning.

entry.title: Hard Problems in Disguise: Distribution-Preserving Subsampling via Multiscale Trees, and a Brief Introduction to Optimal Transport
entry.summary: A deep dive into distribution-preserving subsampling via multiscale tree discrepancy and optimal transport geometry.

entry.title: The Economics of AI Inference Capacity
entry.summary: A model of AI inference capacity competition, congestion rents, and market structure under uncertain demand.

entry.title: Catastrophe Bond Pricing and Risk
entry.summary: An analysis of catastrophe bond pricing, risk channels, and implications for financial market participants.

entry.title: Regimes of Return Smoothing
entry.summary: A framework for identifying and analyzing regime dynamics in smoothed return series.

entry.title: The Sample Complexity of RL-based Optimizers for Financial Applications (Part II): EM FX Carry Trade Control Problem
entry.summary: Part II on sample complexity considerations for RL-based optimizers in finance.

entry.title: The Sample Complexity of RL-based Optimizers for Financial Applications (Part I)
entry.summary: Part I introducing the main setup and complexity lens for RL-driven financial optimization.

entry.title: On Provable Guarantees of Adversarial Robustness of Mixture of Experts
entry.summary: A study of theoretical guarantees and robustness structure in mixture-of-experts architectures.
